title: The Forged Cost Certificate
description: In the lower office strongbox — its hasp bent from a hasty opening — you find a document on village letterhead bearing the project cost figure of $84,900.00 and the signature of Benezette Williams. But the signature is wrong: The signature differs noticeably from authenticated engineering documents associated with Williams and Williams, and whoever produced this document used a printed B and a long crossbar. The document is dated three days ago. Benezette Williams was in the field on that date and did not enter the office.
